thought.text: The expected `task5/include` directory doesn't exist. Let me create symlinks or update CMake. Actually the easier fix: update the include path:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && mkdir -p llvm/task5/include && cd llvm/task5/include && for f in /workspace/YatCC/llvm/build/lib/Target/RISCV/*.inc; do ln -sf "$f" .; done && ls | head -5

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && mkdir -p llvm/task5/include && cd llvm/task5/include && for f in /workspace/YatCC/llvm/build/lib/Target/RISCV/*.inc; do ln -sf \"$f\" .; done && ls | head -5", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Symlink tablegen output"}
